steps.title: Calculate calcium from ice cream
steps.content:
There are 3 cups of ice cream, each containing 242 mg of calcium. Total calcium from ice cream:
$$3 \times 242 = 726 \text{ mg}$$

steps.title: Find calcium per banana
steps.content:
The batch contains 738 mg total. Calcium from the 2 bananas is:
$$738 - 726 = 12 \text{ mg}$$
Calcium in 1 banana:
$$\frac{12}{2} = 6 \text{ mg}$$
That matches Choice A — $6$.
